global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Tencent open-sourced Hy-Memory, a 6-layer memory plugin for AI agents enabling long-term persistent memory via dual System1 (fast pattern matching) and System2 (deep reasoning) retrieval; achieves 35% token reduction and 70% less memory bloat for long-running collaborative agents.

Open-source TypeScript AI agent framework featuring 'observational memory' that achieves 94.87% on LongMemEval with 10x cost reduction vs RAG; eliminates need for external vector DBs or knowledge graphs by using internal background agents with traffic-light priority context compression.

global_discoveries.project: Open Source AI Agent (32k GitHub stars)
global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: An open-source AI agent capable of screen viewing, mouse control, and operating any computer app, highlighting practical advancements in agentic computer-use capabilities.
